global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with product outlines and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting limited stock of bestsellers with a clear call to action.

elements.label: green background
elements.description: A solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and fresh look.

elements.label: two product outlines
elements.description: Two rectangular outlines representing products, drawn with thin lines and positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: two product outlines
elements.description: Another set of two rectangular outlines for products, similar in style to the first, slightly offset.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: A small circular shape located near the bottom center, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: limited stock message
elements.description: A bold text message stating 'Limited stock Shop bestsellers now' in a prominent font.

elements.label: order now button
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button with the text '€29.99 Order now', designed to stand out.

elements.label: VantaStyle logo
elements.description: The logo 'VantaStyle' displayed in a stylish font at the top left corner.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small badge labeled 'SALE' in a contrasting color, positioned at the top right.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label reading 'UGC' in the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
